::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Fable 5).
:::

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
# Key-findings box (#320): a dumb renderer of key_findings.json, which the fit
# pipeline (or scripts/regenerate_key_findings.py) generates from the fit's own
# CSVs. All sentence logic lives in reporting.generate_key_findings so the prose
# cannot drift from the computation (#271). Deliberately self-contained (no
# _setup.qmd dependency) so the include order can move in the #321 restructure.
import json as _kf_json
from pathlib import Path as _KFPath

_kf_path = _KFPath(".") / "key_findings.json"
if not _kf_path.exists():
    print(
        '::: {.callout-note title="Key findings"}\n\n'
        "A key-findings summary is not available for this fit (it predates the "
        "key-findings feature). Re-run `scripts/regenerate_key_findings.py` over "
        "this output directory to generate one, or read the results section "
        "below.\n\n:::"
    )
else:
    with open(_kf_path) as _kf_fh:
        _kf = _kf_json.load(_kf_fh)
    _kf_status = _kf.get("status")
    if _kf_status == "gate_failed":
        _kf_checks = ", ".join(_kf.get("failing_checks", [])) or "unknown"
        print(
            '::: {.callout-important title="Findings withheld: sampling-quality '
            'checks failed"}\n\n'
            f"This fit did not pass the convergence gate (failing: {_kf_checks}), "
            "so no findings are summarised — estimates from an unconverged fit "
            "cannot be trusted. See the convergence section for the failing "
            "diagnostics.\n\n:::"
        )
    elif _kf_status == "ok" and _kf.get("sentences"):
        _kf_lines = "\n".join(f"- {s['text']}" for s in _kf["sentences"])
        print(f'::: {{.callout-tip title="Key findings"}}\n\n{_kf_lines}\n\n:::')
    else:
        _kf_reason = _kf.get("reason") or "the fit's summary files are missing"
        print(
            '::: {.callout-note title="Key findings"}\n\n'
            f"A key-findings summary is not available for this fit ({_kf_reason}). "
            "See the results section below.\n\n:::"
        )
```
